_comment: SDLC pipeline config. Fill validation.checks[] with this project's real format/lint/test/build commands (run top-to-bottom; gates:true blocks the review verdict). Set uiTest.enabled:true only for web projects, then fill devServerCommand/readySignal/port/routes. breakdown.mode controls task-decomposition assessment (recommend = advisory log, auto = generate breakdown.md for coarse tasks, off = skip). planning.clarify:true makes /plan, /generate-tasks ask clarifying questions on ambiguous prompts before writing (default false; --clarify forces it per-invocation). block.maxParallelBlocks limits how many blocks /sdlc-block fans out concurrently (default 3). flow.* controls /sdlc-flow (the default engine for non-trivial specs): autoMerge (merge PR on PASS), testDepth (fast=gating-only tripwire per task, full=whole suite per task), prBase (PR base branch), bailReasons (extra bail triggers). Copy a ready-made profile (Rust / Python / Next.js) from harness.examples.md. If this file is absent, the engines fall back to the spec's `## Validation Commands` section, skip the UI-test stage, and default breakdown to recommend.

checks.name: REPLACE-ME
checks.purpose: Replace with this project's real checks — see harness.examples.md
